name: Documentation
about: Improvements or additions to the project documentation.
title: 'docs(<scope>): <short_description>'
labels: [documentation, bmad-method]
assignees: ''
---

## BMAD Phase

Select the phase this documentation update belongs to:

- [ ] 0. Foundations & Governance
- [ ] 1. Analysis
- [ ] 2. Planning
- [ ] 3. Architecture
- [ ] 4. Implementation

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the documentation changes.

## Purpose

Detail the necessity of this change (e.g., updating the Constitution, clarifying the Source Integration Matrix, or fixing broken links).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Documentation follows the [Project Code Style Guide](./code_styleguides/).
- [ ] All links are verified and functional.
- [ ] Content is updated in the conductor index if necessary.

## Related Artifacts

Link any related PRDs, Stories, or Architecture diagrams.
